arts.ttl: Man Utd handed triple injury boost ahead of Everton clash
arts.sum: Man Utd receive a triple injury boost ahead of the Premier League clash with Everton.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim's brutal Man Utd verdict was spot on - what he must do now is clear
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has endured a baptism of fire since succeeding Erik ten Hag at Manchester United but they could still salvage their season by winning the Europa League

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim forced to clarify Christian Eriksen comment as Man Utd trio return to squad
arts.sum: Christian Eriksen missed Manchester United's 1-0 defeat to Tottenham last Sunday and post-match, boss Ruben Amorim sparked concerns over the midfielder, who suffered a cardiac arrest in 2021

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim 'red flag' that was clear when he arrived is still major issue at Man Utd
arts.sum: Manchester United have barely improved since Gary Neville spotted a glaring problem in Ruben Amorim's first game in charge of the Red Devils, who have endured a wretched season

arts.ttl: From Man Utd flop to Everton saviour - the remarkable return of David Moyes
arts.sum: David Moyes often presents himself as a polite and rarely outspoken Premier League manager, but few would deny the 61-year-old tactician the odd fist pump or smirking grin if his Everton side...

arts.ttl: Manchester United staff warned they could be sacked if they leak information
arts.sum: Chief executive Omar Berrada’s warning email leaked Club to talk to staff about changes in meeting on Monday Manchester United employees have been warned that they are committing “gross misconduct” if they leak confidential information by the chief executive, Omar Berrada, with staff potentially losing their jobs if found guilty of doing so. Berrada sent an email, which has been seen by the Guardian, to all staff on Monday and indicated the club has launched an investigation into leaks. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Man United head coach Ruben Amorim insists his players "are improving" amid sack reports at Old Trafford
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim insists that his team are "improving" amid suggestions that the Portuguese's position at Old Trafford is in doubt.

arts.ttl: Man United handed major boost in Jonathan David 'pursuit' as goal machine confirms summer plan
arts.sum: Manchester United-linked Jonathan David confirms that he will be leaving Lille on a free transfer when his contract expires at the end of June.

arts.ttl: Everton vs Manchester United: Time, how to watch, stats, team news
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim needs a win desperately as he and Man United take on David Moyes' in-form Everton on Saturday.

arts.ttl: David Moyes pulls off Everton miracle as Man Utd penny pinching comes back to bite
arts.sum: Chris Beesley asseses the positions of Everton and Manchester United on and off the pitch in this week's Royal Blue column
